description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Brown wallet with a multi colour design on the front that has a zipped compartment, an inner zipped pocket with an id card holder, six card holders and two insert pockets on either side, zipped pocket at the back, stitch detailing and brand name on a metallic badge with a keyhole design on the front Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions:11 cm x 20 cm
